rulings.Case Title: JENNY DUNCAN ET AL VS. RANDALL NATHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Jenny Duncan And Jennifer Smith'S Amended Motion For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Rand Nathan
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 12, 2018 line 2. Plaintiff Jenny Duncan And Jennifer Smith'S Amended Motion For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Rand Nathan Hearing Required to address: (1) why the Court should not agree with the Defendant that Plaintiff is not entitled to fees having recovered $25,000 only under CCP 1033, CCP 86 and Chavez v. City of Los Angeles (2010) 47 Cal.4th 970; (2) reasonable hours to litigate claims against Nathan (Defendant to provide a number of hours they believe is reasonable to pursue claims against Nathan from September 8, 2014 to September 4, 2016 (a) in limited jurisdiction and (b) unlimited jurisdiction. Defendant to file a supplemental brief no later than 9:00 a.m. on July 12, 2018 providing such numbers in the following format: Hours reasonably spent: (a) #hours and (b) #hours); and (3) applicability of multiplier to action against Nathan. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONEL R TORIBIO ET AL VS. RONNIE PILGRIM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltfs Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 12, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT PEARSON PROPERTIES INC. DBA PRUDENTIAL CA REALTY, RONNIE PILGRIM, GRETCHEN PEARSON, JEFFREY MEARS, CATHERINE CROSS Defendants Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltfs Third Amended Complaint moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONEL R TORIBIO ET AL VS. RONNIE PILGRIM
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 12, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT RONNIE PILGRIM, PEARSON PROPERTIES, INC., GRETCHEN PEARSON, JEFFREY MEARS, CATHERINE CROSS DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with final leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege facts in support of each cause of action as to each defendant. Plaintiff shall not interchangeably use "Defendant" and "Defendants" and must specify exactly who did what, when, and in what manner. As to the contract based causes of action, P must allege fact either (a) showing that there is a contract between Plaintiff and moving defendants, i.e. that Plaintiff is a party to TDS(TDA) or Statewide Advisory, or (b) that by virtue of executing TDS and Advisory moving defendants became parties to the Purchase agreement, if Plaintiff has legal basis for such allegation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEAM LABS, INC. VS. MASASHI TAKAHASHI TAKAHASHI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order And Reconsideration Due To Attorney Fault; Memorandum In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 12, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT MARGARET TAKAHASHI, MASASHI TAKAHASHI Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order And Reconsideration Due To Attorney Fault DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain its burden. As to CCP 473(b) no authority is cited for the proposition that relief is available under the circumstances and no indication (brief, outline of argument) of what moving party would have argued had he complied with the tentative ruling rule. Motion under CCP 1008 is denied without prejudice as it is not brought on proper basis, i.e. "attorney fault" and "mistake" are not grounds for the motion for reconsideration. = (501/REQ)
